70010000050716.description:
Live the life of an escaped worker, washed-up on a lawless station at the edge of an interstellar society. Inspired by the flexibility and freedom of Tabletop RPGs, explore the station, choose your friends, escape your past and change your future.

ABOUT THIS GAME
One of 2022’s most acclaimed indies, the Game Awards-nominated Citizen Sleeper is a Tabletop-inspired narrative RPG set on Erlin’s Eye, a ruined space station that is home to thousands of people trying to survive on the edges of an interstellar capitalist society.

You are a sleeper, a digitised human consciousness in an artificial body, owned by a corporation that wants you back. Thrust amongst the unfamiliar and colourful inhabitants of the Eye, you need to build friendships, earn your keep, and navigate the factions of this strange metropolis, if you hope to survive to see the next cycle.

ROLL THE DICE. DO THE WORK. GET PAID. SURVIVE.
Inspired by Tabletop Roleplaying games, Citizen Sleeper uses Dice, Clocks and Drives. Each cycle you use the dice you are dealt to choose what to do with your time. Make or break alliances, uncover truths and escape your hunters. Survive and ultimately thrive, one cycle at a time.

TURN UP FOR YOUR FRIENDS
The station plays host to characters from all walks of life, trying to eke out an existence among the stars. Salvagers, engineers, hackers, bartenders, street-food vendors, each has a history which brought them here. You choose which of them you wish to help, and together you will shape your future.

ACCESS THEIR SECRETS
Eventually, you will learn to use your dice to hack into the station’s cloud to access decades of digital data, uncover new areas and unlock secrets. This is your unique power, and with it you can change your future. Corporate secrets, rogue AIs and troves of lost data await those willing to dive into the depths of the station’s networks.

YOU WERE MADE TO DIE
Essen-Arp: to them you are just property, one more asset in a portfolio that stretches across the stars. You are the product of an abusive system, in a universe where humanity’s expansion is marked by exploitation and extraction. Escape the makers of your decaying body, and chart your own path in a richly imagined, deeply relevant sci-fi world which explores ideas of precarity, personhood and freedom.

THE COMPLETE EXPERIENCE
Citizen Sleeper now includes all three post-launch DLC episodes FLUX, REFUGE and PURGE, which expand the game and introduce additional characters and locations to Erlin’s Eye in an exciting new late game storyline.
70010000050716.intro: ROLEPLAYING IN THE RUINS OF INTERPLANETARY CAPITALISM
70010000050716.name: Citizen Sleeper

70010000103344.description:
SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim is an adventure game set in 2000s Japan about the lives of Saeko, a girl with mysterious abilities, and the little people she has shrunk to the size of her thumb. Experience Saeko's and the little people's fates in the day and at night, through two separate game systems with different art styles.

You are Rin, the latest addition to the little people. Under Saeko’s protection, you spend your days in her desk drawer together with the other little people.
But don't let your guard down. Saeko has some...interesting hobbies, to say the least.

・Stunning and unique visuals drawn in two different styles of pixel art
・A world filled with brutal allure inspired by many strange tales, beginning with Fueti Shizue’s work
・An original game system which forces players to make difficult choices and live with the consequences
・A soundtrack heavily influenced by future garage and breakcore, composed by the developer himself
・The deepest journey into a developer’s proclivities in indie game history
70010000103344.intro: You opened your eyes to find a giant girl looking down at you...
70010000103344.name: SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim

70010000110111.description:
Mini Airways is a real-time management game with an air traffic control theme.
You will play as a busy air traffic controller in the game: directing planes to take off and land, clearing air traffic, upgrading airspace ...... And most of all, don't let them crash!

Real-TimeATC
Fast-paced, real-time ATC gameplay: Manage airspace, clear planes for takeoff and landing, and avoid near misses! In addition to the normal arrangement of takeoffs and landings, you also need to face the challenges of mountains, no-fly zones, and peak landing hours, so please concentrate!

Upgrade Your Airspace
Every time you finish one day's management, you will be able to pick an upgrade for your airspace and airport: auto holding, accelerating turns, increasing airspace, waypoints ...... upgrade and customize airports to keep flights running more smoothly.

Distinctive Global Maps
As you increase your flight management records, you will gradually unlock a total of 19 airspace maps based on real-world airports—from Beijing Capital, Shanghai Hongqiao, Chengdu Shuangliu in China to Vancouver, New York in North America, and then to London, Amsterdam in Europe... Showcase your air traffic control skills across various global airports!

Surprise Random Events
The game triggers random events under certain specific maps and conditions, featuring classic moments in aviation history: the miracle landing on the Hudson River, Air Force One crossing, emergency incidents, high-priority flights, etc.

Three Selectable Modes
The game offers three modes: Classic, Hardcore, and Sandbox.
In Hardcore mode, the airspace simulates real ATC operations without the ability to pause within the session;
In Sandbox mode, players have full control over waypoints, props, and landing intensity, allowing you to design their own waypoints and test the maximum flight density they can handle.

Custom Maps&Mods
The game supports creating custom maps and mods. Players can import map assets, freely configure runways, restricted areas, and other terrains for gameplay. For those with more demanding needs in aviation management, they can create MODs for altitude, wind speed, etc., enhancing the strategic depth of the game.

Play with your mates
Each airport can accommodate up to 4 people online. You can work with your friends to jointly manage the same airspace to reduce the impact of mistakes and challenge higher scores!
70010000110111.intro: Mini Airways is a real-time management game where you play the role of an air traffic controller. Clear your aircraft to takeoff & land, direct them to the destination.
70010000110111.name: Mini Airways

70010000111065.description:
Turn fitness into a fun, motivating, and interactive beach getaway.
Choose your personal trainer, select your level, and begin your custom fitness journey under the sun through structured workouts that keep you challenged and inspired. Each session combines 7 different exercises, performed for 1 minute 30 seconds with short 30-second breaks — repeated twice for a full 28-minute workout plus warm-up. With over 100 exercises, there are endless variations to keep every session fresh.

Build your personal training schedule across weeks or months, earn rewards for staying consistent, and watch your strength and endurance grow. Each trainer brings unique energy, voice, and encouragement to help you stay motivated.

Vibrant beach visuals, sun-drenched environments, and summery, pumping music transform every workout into a tropical fitness adventure. Whether you’re just starting out or chasing peak performance. This game will help you to stay active, healthy, and motivated long-term.
70010000111065.intro: Start your interactive beach fitness journey now.
70010000111065.name: GET FIT - Beach Girls

70010000111066.description:
Turn fitness into a fun, motivating, and interactive beach getaway.
Choose your personal trainer, select your level, and begin your custom fitness journey under the sun through structured workouts that keep you challenged and inspired. Each session combines 7 different exercises, performed for 1 minute 30 seconds with short 30-second breaks — repeated twice for a full 28-minute workout plus warm-up. With over 100 exercises, there are endless variations to keep every session fresh.

Build your personal training schedule across weeks or months, earn rewards for staying consistent, and watch your strength and endurance grow. Each trainer brings unique energy, voice, and encouragement to help you stay motivated.

Vibrant beach visuals, sun-drenched environments, and summery, pumping music transform every workout into a tropical fitness adventure. Whether you’re just starting out or chasing peak performance. This game will help you to stay active, healthy, and motivated long-term.
70010000111066.intro: Start your interactive beach fitness journey now.
70010000111066.name: GET FIT - Beach Boys

70010000119653.description: Defeat the crazy robots and save the city! Obtain a variety of weapons and props to tackle various challenges.
70010000119653.name: Quantum Beast

70010000119729.description:
Burn rubber, fire rockets, and survive the arena in this explosive combat racing experience.

RACE: Rocket Arena Car Extreme throws you into a post-apocalyptic world of armored cars, deadly tracks, and all-out vehicular warfare. Every race is a battle where speed, firepower, and survival decide who rules the arena.

Play solo or challenge friends in local split-screen mode and prove who dominates the battlefield.

Pick from 21 unique cars, each with its own ultimate ability, upgrade path, and special body kits. Choose your class - SPEEDSTER, GUNNER, or CRUSHER - and master a wide arsenal of abilities, from rocket salvos and mini-missiles to teleport swaps, laser drones, flamethrowers, ghost summons, freezing blasts, and electric traps.

Race through 7 locations, face 5 unique bosses, and test your skills across Career, Event, Season, and Split-Screen modes. Every boss features distinct mechanics and attack patterns, from rocket barrages and enemy summons to teleport strikes, poison shots, and ice crystal traps.

With a variety of mission types and deep upgrade systems, every run offers a new way to dominate the road.

Event mode features tournaments built around specific cars, where you build your run by choosing skill cards between stages and survive with a single shared HP bar.

Season mode introduces daily challenges and leaderboards - complete missions, set records, and earn rewards.

Features:
• 20+ hours of combat racing in Career mode
• 21 unique cars with ultimate abilities
• 3 car classes: SPEEDSTER, GUNNER, CRUSHER
• 4 game modes: Career, Event, Season, Split-Screen
• 7 distinct locations and 5 unique bosses
• Wide range of weapons, abilities, and upgrades
• Local split-screen multiplayer on one console
70010000119729.intro: Jump into explosive combat racing where every track is a battlefield and every rival is a target.
70010000119729.name: RACE: Rocket Arena Car Extreme

70010000119811.description: Making a sandwich is not as easy as it seems. There are many obstacles to overcome in the kitchen to make a delicious meal. You have to be sure to use all the tasty ingredients in the right order. Give it a try and see if you can do it!
70010000119811.intro: Want to know how sandwiches are really made?
70010000119811.name: Run, Sandwich, Run!

70010000119930.description:
Clock Rogue is a roguelike action game that tests your sense of time.
Moves are set to specific times on a 12-second clock and must be activated by sharp timing using your internal clock.

Will you trust your sense of time and take risks for strong moves, or play it safe and advance cautiously? It's up to you!

◆A unique "time structure" combat system
- When you defeat an enemy, you'll get to choose from three moves to add to the clock.
- The stronger the move, the smaller its activation window.
- Consider each move's position carefully and build a clock that fits your playstyle.

◆Battling inside a hedgehog?!
- The game takes place within the body of a hedgehog.
- As Hari Cells, your goal is to protect the hedgehog from marauding viruses.

Build your own clock and protect the hedgehog!
70010000119930.intro: Are you confident in your internal clock?
70010000119930.name: Clock Rogue

70010000121029.description:
Death Run drops you into the world's most dangerous live broadcast: a high-stakes sci-fi game show where participants are thrown into merciless laser gauntlets and the only exit is the finish line. Watched by billions, judged by the millisecond, you are the latest contestant. The question isn't whether the show wants you dead — it does. The question is whether you're fast enough, sharp enough, and precise enough to make it out anyway.
At its core, Death Run is a 3D precision platformer built around fluid movement and split-second decision making. Courses are laced with moving lasers — rotating, sweeping, pulsing, and converging in patterns that demand full attention and quick adaptation. A single hit sends you back to the start. There are no checkpoints. There is only the run.
Your movement arsenal gives you the tools to survive: jump, double jump, upward dash, forward dash, float, and a momentum system that rewards players who keep moving forward without hesitation. Combining these fluidly is the difference between a clean run and a reset.
The game is built in levels, each taking one to two minutes to complete. Every five levels the action pauses for a story segment — expanding the dark, Squid Game-inspired narrative of the show, its hosts, its rules, and the world watching from the outside. The further you progress, the more the story peels back the layers of what this broadcast really is.
With a sleek neon-lit visual style, pounding atmosphere, and courses that escalate in complexity and speed, Death Run is a game about mastery. Each failed run teaches you something. Each completed run is earned.
70010000121029.intro: Dodge lethal lasers in a dark sci-fi death show — or die trying.
70010000121029.name: Death Run

70010000121383.description: Deliver mail as Catto, the town's dedicated Postcat, while meeting unique friends in a vibrant cozy town filled with kitty residents. As you explore the colorful town, encounter adorable residents and brighten up their day by helping them with silly little tasks.
70010000121383.intro: Deliver mail as Catto, the town's dedicated Postcat, while meeting unique friends in a vibrant cozy town filled with kitty residents.
70010000121383.name: Catto's Post Office

70010000122559.description:
Welcome to The Artifactory, a fast-paced couch co-op party game where teamwork, creativity, and a little factory chaos keep the production line moving.

Work together with up to four players to gather materials, craft items, and assemble loot boxes before the delivery trucks leave. Pass ingredients along conveyor belts, organize the production line, and keep the factory running smoothly.

But crafting isn’t just about following recipes. Experiment with different raw materials to discover new item combinations and unlock new ways to produce goods. The more you explore, the more efficient your factory can become.

Each level introduces new challenges — moving platforms, tricky conveyor layouts, and unpredictable obstacles that will test your coordination and communication.

Whether you are playing with friends, family, or going solo, every shift at the factory turns into a hilarious cooperative challenge where timing, teamwork, and quick thinking make all the difference.

Can your team master the machines and keep the deliveries on schedule?

Key Features
Local couch co-op for up to 4 players
Experiment with materials to discover new crafting recipes
Build and manage chaotic production lines
Creative factory environments with unique mechanics
Fast, cooperative party gameplay
Perfect for family game nights and multiplayer sessions
70010000122559.intro: Team up in a chaotic factory where crafting, experimentation, and fast teamwork keep the production line alive.
70010000122559.name: The Artifactory

70010000123584.description:
Move through 3D space to find hints, solve mysteries and escape from the room.
Anyone can play to the end because you can see hints and answers.
70010000123584.name: Escape game R00M14

70010000123973.description:
INCOMING BROADCAST
"Welcome to Rabbithole City, where all animals live a fulfilling life outside nature in this modern, neon-lit city - and it's all thanks to the mightiest species of all: bunnies! A few years ago, they brought us technological progress and a life of fun and pleasure. 

And the small price for such a life? Leaving your filthy natural habitat and your instincts behind. Especially you, carnivores, should change your ways if you want to be accepted in this glorious society. "


FREE THE OPRESSED
Not everyone agrees with the bunnies and many species are suffering under this strict rabbit regime.

You are recruited by a giant Owl who needs your help to sabotage the Bunny Tyranny. He gives you control over the body of a tiger-lynx, Kiyo, and sends you on various stealth and platforming missions to uncover the bunnies’ wicked plans. To avoid the merciless rabbit police, you'll need to make clever decisions about when to be stealthy or violent, or both. Hide in the dynamic shadows, use distractions, attacks, and ninja rope acrobatics, and don't get caught!


THE NIGHTLIFE IS CALLING
Take your time and get lost in the atmosphere of Rabbithole City. Learn more about life in this world, meet colorful characters, explore different locations, and discover how evil the bunnies really are.

Feel the seductive pull of the neon lights and immersive synth-wave beats, but be careful - do not lose sight of your mission.
70010000123973.intro: Kiyo, a feline ex-predator, is trapped in a neon-lit, dystopian city dominated by smartphone-addicted bunnies. Infiltrate the bunnies' facilities and free everyone from their tyrannical grip.
70010000123973.name: KIYO - Bunny Tyranny

70010000124396.description:
The world of legendary arcade games returns as a 3D puzzle!

■ How to Play

Simple controls. Just toss the Voxel-filled capsules into the field!
When two Voxels of the same kind collide, they transform into a larger one.
Keep them on the field—don't let them overflow!


■ Immerse Yourself in Classic Titles with Dedicated Stages & Sounds

Alongside a main stage that blends elements from multiple titles, you can enjoy dedicated stages for these all-time classics:
"PAC-MAN", "DIG DUG", "XEVIOUS", "MAPPY", and "THE TOWER OF DRUAGA"!

Beyond just the visuals, the iconic music will take your gameplay to the next level!


■ Collect Over 100 Unique Voxels

Clear various challenges to keep unlocking new ones!
Build your favorite lineup and enjoy a fully customized experience!


■ Build Your Own Gallery

Showcase your collection in the "Collection Room."
Arrange them freely to recreate your favorite memories or build the ultimate crossover universe!


■ Aim for the Top in Score Attack!

Relive the thrill of carving your name into the arcade high score board.
Compete in online rankings against players worldwide to claim the top spot!


* This product is software for Nintendo Switch™.
* There is also a Nintendo Switch™ 2 version of this product. Please be careful to avoid duplicate purchases.
70010000124396.intro:
Classic pixel art meets 3D!
Namco’s iconic characters are reborn as "voxels."
70010000124396.name: NAMCO LEGENDARY Mountains

70010000124613.description:

70010000124613.intro: ROLEPLAYING IN THE RUINS OF INTERPLANETARY CAPITALISM
70010000124613.name: Citizen Sleeper – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition

70010000124785.description:
Enjoy an authentic crane game experience on Nintendo Switch™!
Take on realistic physics and a wide variety of stages!
In addition to standard crane claws, special machines featuring suction cups, hooks, chains, and water-based stages also appear!
Collect every prize and become a true crane game master!

【Free Play】
Challenge all 36 stages!
Clear a stage by collecting every prize!
Aim for a 3-star rating with the fastest clear times!

【Challenge】
Take on 6 stages in a row!
Compete for the fastest times and climb the global rankings!

【Collection Room】
Display and admire the prizes you've collected!
Create your very own original room!
70010000124785.intro: The hugely popular crane game series is back and better than ever! Aim, grab, and hook your prizes! Master a variety of crane arms and win tons of prizes!
70010000124785.name: Let's Aim! Crane Game

70010000125504.description:
Prepare yourself to challenge your logic in an adventure deep in the heart of the desert, where every movement could be your last. In Sands and Relics, walking is just as dangerous as it is necessary, and every step changes the world beneath your feet.

Cross ancient ruins, explore fragile pathways, and uncover hidden relics in clever puzzles that blend strategy, planning, and that satisfying feeling of discovering the perfect solution. Here, the ground waits for no one. Sand tiles crack, collapse, and disappear as you move forward, turning the environment into a living puzzle.

Each level is a compact logic challenge where you must think before acting, calculate routes, and carefully decide where to step. Some surfaces can withstand more than one step, while others collapse immediately, and a single mistake can leave you trapped in the void.

As the journey continues, new mechanics make the puzzles even more creative, including teleporters, narrow paths, and combinations that demand full awareness of the environment. All of this comes wrapped in charming pixel art visuals that create a cozy atmosphere while keeping your mind engaged.

With 30 carefully crafted levels, simple controls, and the freedom to undo moves or restart whenever you want, Sands and Relics delivers an accessible, smart, and deeply satisfying experience for players who love strategic puzzles without time pressure.

Observe the terrain, plan your route, and discover whether your footsteps will be enough to reach the lost relic.
70010000125504.name: Sands and Relics

70010000125758.description:
Hexara is a puzzle game where strategy meets satisfying combo-building. Rotate clusters of hexagons to match colors, create powerful formations, and climb to higher levels.

Simple to learn, but difficult to master, every move matters as the grid evolves and new challenges appear. Chain combos, create rare formations, and push your score further with each run.

Featuring multiple game modes, increasing difficulty, and endless replayability, Hexara is perfect for quick sessions or long high-score chases.

How far can you go before the grid fills up?
70010000125758.intro:
Build combos, outsmart the grid, chase the perfect run. Perfect for fans of classic puzzle games.
Easy to pick up, hard to put down.
70010000125758.name: Hexara

70010000125791.description:
The highly anticipated sequel to one of 2022’s most acclaimed RPGs!

You are a sleeper, an emulation of a human mind housed in an artificial body. You are on the run from the corporation that made you and the gang that seeks to control you. Commandeer a ship, build a network of crew and allies, and take on challenging contracts as you seek to build a future for yourself.

Choose a class, configure your skills and assemble your crew in unique tabletop-inspired gameplay. Your future depends on the roll of a dice, as you make difficult choices in a complex world. Reinventing the award-winning systems of Citizen Sleeper, this RPG will satisfy both fans of the original game and new players alike.

STAY AHEAD OF YOUR PAST
After a desperate attempt to free yourself from servitude by rewriting the very code that governs your system, you are on the run again, this time with a malfunctioning body, a price on your head and no memory of your past.

REBOOT / REBUILD / REPAIR
Citizen Sleeper’s revolutionary dice system returns, revised for the sequel. Manage your stress or take damage to your dice. Deal with glitches as they accrue in your system. Push yourself to get lucky and make this cycle count.

PUSH YOUR LUCK
Each character class now has a unique “Push” ability that can help you turn the tide of a difficult job or send you into a dangerous spiral depending on how and when you choose to use it. Reroll your dice to change your fate, or focus a single die to bet everything on a big success.

NAVIGATE THE BELT
Chart a course from hub to hub with complete freedom, taking on jobs and setting goals as you see fit. A living world, the Starward Belt rewards curiosity and care, but it's up to you to decide which locations and stories deserve your time and resources.

DO THE JOB, GET PAID
Contracts offer a new kind of focussed, tactical gameplay to the Citizen Sleeper experience. You’ll need to prepare carefully and choose the right approach for these multi-cycle, high-risk, high-reward jobs, but you’ll also have to react and adapt to both the roll of the dice and the twists and turns of each task.

CHOOSE YOUR FUTURE
Player choice is a massive part of the Citizen Sleeper experience, and the sequel deepens this with new skill checks that allow you to express your class and character in scenes, as well as branching storylines that will ask you to make hard choices. The future of your character is up to you.
70010000125791.name: Citizen Sleeper 2: Starward Vector – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition

70010000126152.description:
Wantama☆Life is a fully voiced visual novel starring Tamaki Inuyama.
As the teacher, lead the school trip while protecting the secrets your student carry.
Enjoy a comedy story filled with trouble at tourist spots and inns, brought to life by a cast of unique characters.

◆Synopsis
「Hey sensei... I am actually an otokonoko.」
You have discovered the secret of Tamaki Inuyama.
And at the worst timing the school trip begins!

Tourist spots, yukata, hot springs――
One wrong step, leads to an instant disaster.

Dragged around by Tamaki's best friend Mea Kagura,
and with senior teacher Norio Tsukudani getting pulled into the chaos too!?

Can you keep Tamaki’s secret
hidden until the very end――!?

School trip where the truth must never come out begins!

◆Characters
・Tamaki Inuyama (VA:Tamaki Inuyama)
A student in the class where you serve as assistant homeroom teacher.
He is an Otokonoko who hides that fact from those around, while also having a soft spot for cute girls.
An extreme unicorn fan of Mea Kagura.

・Mea Kagura (VA:Mea Kagura)
A student in the class where you serve as assistant homeroom teacher. Tamaki's best friend.
She knows Tamaki's secret and helps keep it hidden from everyone else.
She loves handsome guys and plans to find the perfect boyfriend during the school trip.

・Norio Tsukudani  (VA:Norio Tsukudani)
The homeroom teacher of the class where you serve as assistant teacher, and your former mentor from your own school days.
She gives you plenty of support as you struggle to keep up with her free-spirited students.
There seems to be something going on between her and Tamaki...?
70010000126152.intro: Starring the Vtuber Tamaki Inuyama! Exposure means over. The secret school trip begins...
70010000126152.name: Wantama☆Life

70010000126608.description:
Discover the truth hidden behind a famous vlogger's online fame. What begins as curiosity quickly turns into a nightmare when the doors lock behind you and escape becomes your only goal.

Explore dark rooms, search for useful items, unlock new areas, and solve escape-room style puzzles. Hidden passages, secret compartments, strange mechanisms, and mysterious clues reveal the story of the house and its owner.

Stay out of sight and avoid the vlogger at all costs. He reacts to noise, patrols the house, and can appear when you least expect it. Hide, move carefully, and use your surroundings to survive.

Experience a mix of exploration, stealth, puzzles, and tense chase sequences. Every item may help you solve a challenge or open a path forward.

Features:

• Survival horror with stealth gameplay
• Escape-room inspired puzzles and challenges
• Explore a mysterious house filled with secrets
• Search for items and unlock new areas
• Hide from a dangerous and unpredictable pursuer
• Atmospheric horror with touches of humor and satire
• Story-driven adventure with unusual characters
• Multiple ways to approach survival and escape

Can you uncover the vlogger's secrets and find a way out?
70010000126608.intro: Sneak into a famous vlogger's house, uncover his secrets, solve puzzles, and escape before he finds you.
70010000126608.name: Escape from Vlogger: Runaway

70010000126934.description:
Mind Detective Psychology Test is a casual quiz game where you observe everyday behaviors and choose the answer that seems to reveal a person’s personality.

How someone sits, talks, moves, or reacts may give you a hint.
Look carefully at each situation, compare the choices, and make your guess.

The rules are simple:
・Read the question
・Check the four possible answers
・Choose the behavior that fits best
・Enjoy the result as a light psychology test

Each question is short, so it is easy to play during a break, on your own, or while chatting with family and friends.
It is also a good choice for players who enjoy personality quizzes, observation games, brain-training, and simple choice-based puzzles.

No complicated controls are needed.
Just read, observe, choose, and enjoy a quick detective-style psychology test.

Can you read the small clues hidden in everyday behavior?

The game supports both button controls and touch controls, allowing you to play in TV mode, handheld mode, or tabletop mode.
※This game is designed to be played on the Nintendo Switch™ in vertical orientation.
70010000126934.intro:
Read the clues, choose the behavior!
A casual psychology quiz for quick play
Discover personalities in everyday actions
70010000126934.name: Mind Detective Psychology Test

70010000127154.description:
You landed on this island with a relationship back home and zero intention of complicating things. Then the girls showed up. 

Beautiful, bold, and completely unaware that you're supposed to be off limits. The problem is, so are they.

Work the island, build your reputation, and find yourself in situations you didn't plan for. Dates that start innocent and don't stay that way. Late night chats that go further than they should. 

Every girl here pulls at something different, and the more time you spend with them, the harder it gets to remember why you're supposed to say no. The in-game chat keeps you close even when you're apart. And distance, on an island this small, doesn't last long.

A girl who goes after what she wants without apology, one who pretends she feels nothing until she does, a wild one who makes terrible ideas sound perfect... None of them are asking you to choose. Not yet.

Someone is waiting for you. The island doesn't care.


Features:

● ISLAND JOBS & SKILL PROGRESSION: Build your life on the island and open doors you weren't supposed to open.

● DATES YOU WEREN'T SUPPOSED TO GO ON: Hidden coves, rooftop bars, late nights by the water. Every date is a line you're crossing.

● IN-GAME CHAT SYSTEM: Keep the conversations going. The ones back home, and the ones that are getting complicated.

● EXCLUSIVE GALLERY IMAGES: The further you go, the more unlocks. Some things can't be unseen.

● MULTIPLE ENDINGS: You can stay faithful. You can fall. You can burn everything down. The choice is yours.

● 30 DAYS ON THE ISLAND: The summer has an expiration date. Every day you waste is a door that closes forever.


Someone at home is waiting for you.
The girls on this island are not waiting for anyone.
How long can you hold out?
70010000127154.intro:
You have someone waiting at home.
But the island doesn't know that, and neither do they.
70010000127154.name: Love Island: Forbidden Girls Temptation

70010000127160.description:
You landed on this island with a relationship back home and zero intention of complicating things. Then the boys showed up.

Beautiful, bold, and completely unaware that you're supposed to be off limits. The problem is, so are they.

Work the island, build your reputation, and find yourself in situations you never saw coming. Dates that start as nothing and become something you don't have a name for yet. Late night chats that go places you didn't expect to go.

Every guy here pulls at something you didn't know was there, and the more time you spend with them, the harder it gets to look away. The in-game chat keeps you close even when you're apart. And on an island this small, distance doesn't fix anything.

A guy who goes after what he wants and doesn't hide it, one who acts untouchable until he isn't, a reckless one who makes bad decisions feel like the only option... None of them are asking you to choose. Not yet.

Someone is waiting for you. The island doesn't care.


Features:

● ISLAND JOBS & SKILL PROGRESSION: Build your life on the island and open doors you weren't supposed to open.

● DATES YOU WEREN'T SUPPOSED TO GO ON: Hidden coves, rooftop bars, late nights by the water. Every date is a line you're crossing.

● IN-GAME CHAT SYSTEM: Keep the conversations going. The ones back home, and the ones that are getting complicated.

● EXCLUSIVE GALLERY IMAGES: The further you go, the more unlocks. Some things can't be unseen.

● MULTIPLE ENDINGS: You can stay faithful. You can fall. You can burn everything down. The choice is yours.

● 30 DAYS ON THE ISLAND: The summer has an expiration date. Every day you waste is a door that closes forever.


Someone at home is waiting for you.
The boys on this island are not waiting for anyone.
How long can you hold out?
70010000127160.intro:
You have someone waiting at home.
But the island doesn't know that, and neither do they.
70010000127160.name: Love Island: Forbidden Boys Temptation

70010000128029.description:
Turn mixed-up photo panels and complete bright, summer-themed pictures in this casual rotation puzzle.

Look closely at each panel, find how the image connects, and rotate the pieces until the full photo comes together.

How to play:
・Check the direction of each photo panel
・Select panels that are facing the wrong way
・Rotate them to complete the picture

The rules are simple and easy to understand, making it a good choice for short breaks, relaxed solo play, or playing together with family and friends.

If you get stuck, the hint feature helps you keep going, so even puzzle beginners can enjoy each stage at their own pace.

Complete sunny resort-style photos one by one and enjoy a light puzzle experience that tests your observation skills!
70010000128029.intro:
Rotate each photo into place!
A relaxing summer puzzle for quick play
Enjoy solo or solve together with friends
70010000128029.name: Resort Beauties : HENTAI Photo Puzzle

70010000128359.description:
William James Magnus III has been murdered, and you’re the only one with the investigative know-how to interrogate the other passengers and find the true culprit. But, with the train barreling towards the station, you only have so much time to solve the case before the murderer gets away.

Framed as a classic choose-your-own-adventure novel, Murder on the Disorient Express takes the best aspects of your favorite mystery novels and adds an interactive twist. Choose who you speak to, what you investigate, collect evidence, and make your final deduction based on limited information. Choose wisely, or the culprit will get off scot-free.

With only so many possible conversations to have and options to explore, Murder on the Disorient Express can’t be fully experienced in one playthrough. Take different paths and follow different leads to get a complete view of the events in additional playthroughs.

Talk with a cast of colorful characters, collect clues, and manage your time to seek out over a dozen possible endings. Unlock them all to see the full story.
70010000128359.intro:
An interactive murder mystery on the world famous train!
Step into the role of a cunning detective tasked with solving a perplexing murder before time runs out.
70010000128359.name: Murder on the Disorient Express

70010000128476.description:
Is your "common sense" really up to global standards?

Which one is the Nile? Who built the pyramids? What's the largest planet in our solar system?
You should know these — but when asked, the answer slips away.
How far does your knowledge really reach?

This game serves up 50 visual quiz questions across 8 categories: nature, geography, astronomy, science, history, sports, food, and art & culture — all rooted in worldwide common sense.

Read the question, then choose the correct answer from 4 images.
"Oh, I know this!" or "Wait, which one is it?"
Compare and decide — a 4-choice visual quiz.

How to play is simple.
・Read the question
・Pick the correct answer from 4 images
・Stuck? Open the hint for a clue
・After answering, learn more from the detailed explanation

Get it right and feel great. Miss it and learn something new.
By question 50, the world feels a little closer.

Squeeze in a quick brain refresh on your commute, on a break, or before bed.
Perfect for sparking "Did you know?" conversations with family and friends.

So — can you make the cut?
Take on the worldwide common sense challenge.

The game supports both button controls and touch controls, allowing you to play in TV mode, handheld mode, or tabletop mode.
70010000128476.intro:
Could you hold your own anywhere in the world?
The global common sense every grown-up should know.
70010000128476.name: Can You Make the Cut? Worldwide Common Sense Check

70010000128645.description:
"I'm just playing a game, but somehow my workplace English is getting better."
Want to experience this ultimate two-for-one deal?

Enjoy 4-choice quizzes while quickly mastering the "real-life English idioms" that native speakers naturally use in business settings.

Playing is super easy：
・Read the question and the target word carefully.
・Pick your answer from the 4 choices.
・Get it right to unlock detailed explanations you can use right away in your actual business emails and conversations!

No typing or complicated controls needed!
It's totally fine if you're feeling a bit rusty with your English.

If you get stuck, our friendly hint feature has your back. You can soak up knowledge like a fun trivia game, completely stress-free with no ""Game Over"" screens to worry about.

Thanks to the fast-paced, one-question-at-a-time format, it's perfect for sneaking in some playtime during your daily commute or while waiting for a meeting to start!

Turn your daily ""mindless screen time"" into meaningful self-investment. Level up your English skills and seriously impress your coworkers and business partners!
70010000128645.intro:
Master the business English native speakers actually use!
Have fun leveling up your skills through quizzes!
70010000128645.name: Manga English Native Phrase Quiz

70010000128751.description:
Your school days are long gone — but is the knowledge still with you?

The human body, parts of a flower, phases of the moon, a volcano's cross-section —
You should remember them, but when asked "where is it?" your finger hesitates.
Can your knowledge spot the one correct point in the picture?

This game offers 50 questions across 6 categories: human body, plants, animals, landforms, sky & space, and architecture.
Tap the correct part of a textbook-style illustration — a knowledge × academic quiz.

"Where is the heart?" "Which one is the stamen?" "Which is the first-quarter moon?" "Where is a volcano's crater?"
There's only one correct spot in each image. Observe carefully and tap with what you know.

How to play is simple.
・Look closely at the diagram
・Tap the part being asked about
・Stuck? Open the hint for a clue about the part's role or feature

Get it right and feel sharper. Miss it and finally see how it works.
By question 50, the world inside the diagrams feels much closer.

Squeeze in a relaxed brush-up on your commute, on a break, or before bed.
Perfect for swapping "Where is this?" challenges with family and friends.

Know the world, and the answer shows up.
So — can you spot it in the picture?
70010000128751.intro:
Where's the heart? Which one is the stamen? Which moon is full?
That diagram from school — open it up again.
70010000128751.name: Spot It in the Picture!WorldwideKnowledge × Academic Quiz

70010000128953.description:
You picked one without thinking — but the reason hides deep inside.

"I just chose it... I don't really know why."
"I didn't even realize I felt that way."
The casual choices are the ones that reveal your true feelings.

This game is a simple psychological test where you look at a symbolic illustration and pick how it makes you feel from 4 choices. The moment you pick, a different "true feelings" diagnosis appears for each choice.

A path. A door. A mirror. A still water surface. A starry sky. An hourglass. A pair of scales. A birdcage —
50 universal symbolic motifs that resonate with anyone, anywhere, pull your hidden feelings to the surface.

How to play is simple.
・Look at the image and pick how you feel from 4 choices
・Read the "true feelings" diagnosis for your choice
・Move to the next image

"Too accurate to be scary..."
"I didn't know I felt this way."
50 questions, each one cutting from a different angle.

Because there is no right answer, you can play again and again — alone, with friends, with family.
A quick distraction or a serious self-check — light to start, deep when it lands.

Ready to have your true feelings revealed?
70010000128953.intro:
What did you feel? That choice reveals your true self.
One image. Four feelings. Which one is yours?
70010000128953.name: Too Accurate to Be Scary...Your True Feelings Revealed by This Image

70010000128961.description:
The basics of how the world works — how many can you actually answer?

Why is the sky blue? Why do dogs bond with humans? Why are pyramids shaped like that?
The everyday "why?" trips you up the moment you're asked. There's general knowledge every adult should hold.

This game offers 80 picture-based 4-choice questions across 8 categories — animals, nature, world landmarks, food & living, science, space, the human body, and culture & history — studied alongside Professor Neumann.

"What is this?" "Why does it happen?"
Look at the image, pick your answer, and let the explanation make it click.

How to play is simple.
・Read the question and look at the image
・Choose from 4 answers
・After answering, deepen your knowledge with Professor Neumann's explanation

Get it right and feel sharper. Miss it and find a fresh "huh, really?"
By question 80, the world will look a little richer.

Squeeze in a relaxed knowledge boost on your commute, on a break, or before bed.
Perfect for sparking "Did you know?" chats with family and friends.

World-class general knowledge, at your fingertips.
So — can you earn the adult certification?
70010000128961.intro: Does your knowledge really measure up?
70010000128961.name: Professor Neumann's Adult Certification Test

70010000129205.description:
A station, an office, a bank counter, a hospital at night — somewhere, one thing belongs to a different era.

A station attendant holds up an hourglass to time the departing trains.
Someone signs documents with a quill dipped in ink.
A bank clerk clicks the beads of an abacus to do the math.
— Someone is actively using an "old tool" that should be long gone.

This game is a click puzzle where you spot the "old tool that doesn't belong" hidden in a full-color modern or near-future scene.
It's drawn in vivid full color, not sepia, so color won't help you find it.
You'll have to notice it by shape, silhouette, or the strangeness of how it's being used.

50 scenes in all.
Train stations, airports, subways, offices, homes, libraries, hospitals, schools, shops, factories, and even near-future scenes —
every scene looks like normal everyday life, but one thing that shouldn't exist in the modern day is hidden in "active use."

How to play is simple.
・Observe the scene carefully
・Tap the old tool that doesn't belong to this era
・The answer and "what the tool is" are revealed

Hints gently suggest the tool's purpose or function, so you won't get stuck.
They never tell you where to look, so the joy of figuring it out is all yours.

The thrill of "Wait, is that from the old days?"
The pleasure of "I never knew that existed!"
A grown-up observation puzzle that hops between eras.

So, can you spot what's off in this world?
70010000129205.intro:
Something's off in this office, isn't it?
Spot the old tool hiding in plain sight today.
70010000129205.name: Something's Off in This World. Era Anomaly Quiz

70010000129398.description:
You think you know — but the world is full of surprises hiding in plain sight.

"An octopus has three hearts." "There's no sound in space." "Honey never spoils."
The kinds of facts that make you want to share — they're tucked away all over the world.
How many of those "surprising truths" can your knowledge pin down?

This game offers 1000 picture-based true-or-false questions across 20 categories — animals, nature, space, history, food, the human body, science, and more.

"Wait, is that real?" "No way, that can't be true…"
Trust your instinct and your knowledge, then pick ○ or ×.

How to play is simple.
・Read the question and look at the image
・Pick ○ (true) or × (false)
・After answering, get the full picture with the detailed explanation

Get it right and feel "of course". Miss it and find a fresh "wait, what!?"
By question 1000, you'll have plenty of stories to share.

Squeeze in a relaxed trivia hit on your commute, on a break, or before bed.
Perfect for sparking "Did you know?" chats with family and friends.

How many do you actually know?
Each question is a fresh "huh!" worth sharing. So — take the challenge.

The game supports both button controls and touch controls, allowing you to play in TV mode, handheld mode, or tabletop mode.
70010000129398.intro:
Animals, space, history, food, the human body — 1000 "huh!" facts you didn't know.
One question, and you'll want to tell someone.
70010000129398.name: One Question and You'll Want to Share It! 1000 Trivia Quiz Questions

70010000129411.description:
A new cozy musical adventure is waiting to be discovered!

Shy Cats Hidden Orchestra 2 is the sequel to the charming hidden object game Shy Cats Hidden Orchestra. This time, finding the cats is only the beginning: their instruments are hiding too!

Explore 10 delightful levels filled with cute details and carefully hidden surprises. Search every corner to find the cats and their instruments, then complete each musical pair to bring the orchestra back together.

Each level also hides a special key. Find it to open a treasure chest, reveal a hidden instrument, and discover the shyest cat of them all.

With 32 hidden objects in every level, Shy Cats Hidden Orchestra 2 offers a relaxing search filled with charming discoveries, musical rewards, and plenty of adorable cats.
70010000129411.intro: Find the cats. Discover the instruments. Reunite the orchestra!
70010000129411.name: Shy Cats Hidden Orchestra 2

70050000070551.description:
Between Worlds
Not all places are meant to be destinations. The Train Station is a place of arrivals, departures, and fleeting encounters. Mortals pass through, never feeling safe, as though they are being watched. Platforms fade into the darkness. The tunnels echo with distant sounds from the past and the present. Panic spreads faster than the Phantom Train Conductor can operate his locomotive.

Introducing a new Train Station level built upon crowds, open spaces, and relentless motion. No place ever feels secure.

Introducing a new game mode: Second Side of the Coin.

For the first time, step into the role of a Ghost-breaker who hunts ghosts, sets traps, and experiences fear from the other side—where control is fleeting and fragile, resources are limited, and every mistake means punishment.
70050000070551.name: Between Worlds

70050000072575.description:
Live the life of an escaped worker, washed-up on a lawless station at the edge of an interstellar society. Inspired by the flexibility and freedom of Tabletop RPGs, explore the station, choose your friends, escape your past and change your future.

ABOUT THIS GAME
One of 2022’s most acclaimed indies, the Game Awards-nominated Citizen Sleeper is a Tabletop-inspired narrative RPG set on Erlin’s Eye, a ruined space station that is home to thousands of people trying to survive on the edges of an interstellar capitalist society.

You are a sleeper, a digitised human consciousness in an artificial body, owned by a corporation that wants you back. Thrust amongst the unfamiliar and colourful inhabitants of the Eye, you need to build friendships, earn your keep, and navigate the factions of this strange metropolis, if you hope to survive to see the next cycle.

ROLL THE DICE. DO THE WORK. GET PAID. SURVIVE.
Inspired by Tabletop Roleplaying games, Citizen Sleeper uses Dice, Clocks and Drives. Each cycle you use the dice you are dealt to choose what to do with your time. Make or break alliances, uncover truths and escape your hunters. Survive and ultimately thrive, one cycle at a time.

TURN UP FOR YOUR FRIENDS
The station plays host to characters from all walks of life, trying to eke out an existence among the stars. Salvagers, engineers, hackers, bartenders, street-food vendors, each has a history which brought them here. You choose which of them you wish to help, and together you will shape your future.

ACCESS THEIR SECRETS
Eventually, you will learn to use your dice to hack into the station’s cloud to access decades of digital data, uncover new areas and unlock secrets. This is your unique power, and with it you can change your future. Corporate secrets, rogue AIs and troves of lost data await those willing to dive into the depths of the station’s networks.

YOU WERE MADE TO DIE
Essen-Arp: to them you are just property, one more asset in a portfolio that stretches across the stars. You are the product of an abusive system, in a universe where humanity’s expansion is marked by exploitation and extraction. Escape the makers of your decaying body, and chart your own path in a richly imagined, deeply relevant sci-fi world which explores ideas of precarity, personhood and freedom.

THE COMPLETE EXPERIENCE
Citizen Sleeper now includes all three post-launch DLC episodes FLUX, REFUGE and PURGE, which expand the game and introduce additional characters and locations to Erlin’s Eye in an exciting new late game storyline.
70050000072575.intro: ROLEPLAYING IN THE RUINS OF INTERPLANETARY CAPITALISM
70050000072575.name: Citizen Sleeper – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70050000072887.description:
The long-awaited soundtrack by developer kyp — beloved even by the characters within the game — is finally available!

“Only boring nameless instrumental songs. It fits right with the image of a lonely and introverted girl.”
Kazu

“The music here stinks”
Kina
70050000072887.intro:
Original soundtrack by developer kyp.
A collection of tracks that bring back to life the everyday world inside that drawer.
70050000072887.name: SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim Soundtrack

70050000072984.description:
The highly anticipated sequel to one of 2022’s most acclaimed RPGs!

You are a sleeper, an emulation of a human mind housed in an artificial body. You are on the run from the corporation that made you and the gang that seeks to control you. Commandeer a ship, build a network of crew and allies, and take on challenging contracts as you seek to build a future for yourself.

Choose a class, configure your skills and assemble your crew in unique tabletop-inspired gameplay. Your future depends on the roll of a dice, as you make difficult choices in a complex world. Reinventing the award-winning systems of Citizen Sleeper, this RPG will satisfy both fans of the original game and new players alike.

STAY AHEAD OF YOUR PAST
After a desperate attempt to free yourself from servitude by rewriting the very code that governs your system, you are on the run again, this time with a malfunctioning body, a price on your head and no memory of your past.

REBOOT / REBUILD / REPAIR
Citizen Sleeper’s revolutionary dice system returns, revised for the sequel. Manage your stress or take damage to your dice. Deal with glitches as they accrue in your system. Push yourself to get lucky and make this cycle count.

PUSH YOUR LUCK
Each character class now has a unique “Push” ability that can help you turn the tide of a difficult job or send you into a dangerous spiral depending on how and when you choose to use it. Reroll your dice to change your fate, or focus a single die to bet everything on a big success.

NAVIGATE THE BELT
Chart a course from hub to hub with complete freedom, taking on jobs and setting goals as you see fit. A living world, the Starward Belt rewards curiosity and care, but it's up to you to decide which locations and stories deserve your time and resources.

DO THE JOB, GET PAID
Contracts offer a new kind of focussed, tactical gameplay to the Citizen Sleeper experience. You’ll need to prepare carefully and choose the right approach for these multi-cycle, high-risk, high-reward jobs, but you’ll also have to react and adapt to both the roll of the dice and the twists and turns of each task.

CHOOSE YOUR FUTURE
Player choice is a massive part of the Citizen Sleeper experience, and the sequel deepens this with new skill checks that allow you to express your class and character in scenes, as well as branching storylines that will ask you to make hard choices. The future of your character is up to you.
70050000072984.name: Citizen Sleeper 2: Starward Vector – Nintendo Switch™ 2 Edition Upgrade Pack

70050000073547.description:
This Diorama set includes the following: 

- 20 New levels

- 20 Hidden jigsaw pieces to complete 4 new collectibles!

- 40 New stickers to decorate your photos!
70050000073547.intro: Discover and find the differences in the new handcrafted diorama set from Tiny Lands 2.
70050000073547.name: Diorama set 1

70050000073664.description:
Expand your garage with the RACE - Razor Pack!

Razor is a fast Speedster-class combat car built for high-speed arena racing. With a sharp futuristic body, cutting-edge combat gear, and a lightweight design, it is made to strike fast and outmaneuver rivals on post-apocalyptic tracks.

Its ultimate ability, Blade Storm, surrounds the car with a storm of blades, damaging enemies on collision.

This DLC includes:
- Razor car
- 6 vinyls
- 6 flags
- 4 avatars

Vinyls and flags can be used on any unlocked car.
70050000073664.intro: Unlock the Razor car and exclusive customization items.
70050000073664.name: RACE - Razor Pack

70070000037368.description:
Step into a disorienting and eerie world where every corridor feels alive and every shadow hides a secret. In Backrooms Pools, navigate vast pools of murky water, shifting walls, and echoing footsteps as you try to uncover what lurks in the darkness. Every turn deepens the tension and tests your courage.

This bundle includes main title and BACKROOMS POOLS: MONSTERS BELOW DLC, taking your nightmare further. Explore even deeper submerged corridors and face two terrifying new creatures that haunt the watery depths. Will you escape unscathed, or become just another shadow in the endless maze?

Survive, explore, and confront the horrors that wait beneath the surface.
70070000037368.intro: Face the unknown in the endless pools!
70070000037368.name: BACKROOMS POOLS GOLD EDITION

70070000037459.description:
Enter a nightmarish version of the ordinary in survival horror experience. Trapped inside an endless, eerie supermarket, you must explore abandoned aisles, solve cryptic puzzles, and search for an escape while something unseen stalks your every move. Flickering lights, shifting spaces, and a constant sense of dread turn every step into a test of survival.

This bundle includes the main title and the Backrooms: Exit from Supermarket Creepy Music DLC, intensifying the horror with a deeply unsettling soundtrack. Experience distorted ambient sounds, eerie supermarket jingles, and reactive audio that follows your every move, amplifying the tension with every step. The deeper you go, the more the sound itself becomes part of the nightmare.

Stay quiet, stay alert, and try to escape before the darkness and the sound consume you.
70070000037459.intro: Lost in the supermarket of nightmares
70070000037459.name: Backrooms: Exit from Supermarket GOLD EDITION

70070000037477.description:
You opened your eyes to find a giant girl looking down at you...

SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim is an adventure game set in 2000s Japan about the lives of Saeko, a girl with mysterious abilities, and the little people she has shrunk to the size of her thumb.
Experience Saeko's and the little people's fates in the day and at night, through two separate game systems with different art styles.

You are Rin, the latest addition to the little people. Under Saeko’s protection, you spend your days in her desk drawer together with the other little people.
But don't let your guard down. Saeko has some...interesting hobbies, to say the least.

・Stunning and unique visuals drawn in two different styles of pixel art
・A world filled with brutal allure inspired by many strange tales, beginning with Fueti Shizue’s work
・An original game system which forces players to make difficult choices and live with the consequences
・A soundtrack heavily influenced by future garage and breakcore, composed by the developer himself
・The deepest journey into a developer’s proclivities in indie game history

[The Digital Deluxe Edition includes the Original Soundtrack]
Original soundtrack by developer kyp.
A collection of tracks that bring back to life the everyday world inside that drawer.
70070000037477.intro: Get the Digital Deluxe Edition bundled with the Original Soundtrack!
70070000037477.name: SAEKO: Giantess Dating Sim Digital Deluxe Edition

70010000124908.description:
Defend the gates. Survive the siege.
Step into a medieval battlefield where your strategy and skill decide the fate of the kingdom. Build defenses, fight back, and hold your fortress against relentless waves of invaders.
Prepare your defenses, place towers, and get ready for incoming waves of enemies. Each enemy type requires a different approach — from fast attackers to heavily armored units and powerful siege weapons that threaten to break your gates.
You are not just a commander — you fight alongside your defenses. Use your crossbow and repair structures during battle to keep your fortress standing. Every decision matters as the pressure increases with each wave.
Earn resources by defeating enemies and use them wisely to build new defenses or upgrade existing ones. Balance your strategy between offense and defense to handle growing threats and survive until the final wave.
With every attack, the battlefield becomes more intense, forcing you to adapt, reposition, and react quickly to protect your base at all costs.
Key Features:
	•	Combine FPS combat with tower defense gameplay
	•	Build and upgrade defensive structures
	•	Survive waves of increasingly powerful enemies
	•	Fight actively using weapons 
	•	Manage resources to strengthen your defense
	•	Face diverse enemy types and strategic challenges
Stand your ground, defend your kingdom, and survive every wave.
70010000124908.intro: Stand between chaos and the kingdom!
70010000124908.name: Medieval Castle Siege Defense vs Invaders

70010000125245.description:
Axel Quest is a retro-style action-adventure with Metroidvania elements.

Explore a dangerous pixel-art world, fight deadly monsters, defeat powerful bosses, and discover new paths as you progress. Along the journey, you'll collect equipment, meet helpful NPCs, and uncover hidden secrets that reward your curiosity.

With tight controls and fast-paced gameplay, Axel Quest offers a nostalgic experience inspired by classic 2D games, designed for both newcomers and seasoned players.


Features:
* Sword-based combat with responsive controls
* Secret areas and hidden paths to explore
* NPCs and shops to upgrade your equipment
* Challenging boss encounters
* Handcrafted pixel art visuals and retro soundtrack
70010000125245.intro: Explore a handcrafted pixel-art world inspired by retro classics.
70010000125245.name: Axel Quest

70010000126764.description:
Pixel Blaster DX is a fast-paced hybrid-casual color shooter and sorting puzzle game built for quick, satisfying gameplay sessions.
Tap, shoot, match colors, manage the conveyor belt, and clear pixel cube formations before your holders are full.
The rules are simple and easy to learn. Tap the color-coded sphere shooters on the left side of the screen to launch them onto the rotating circular conveyor belt.
Each sphere shoots cubes that match its own color, for example:
• Pink spheres shoot pink cubes
• Cyan spheres shoot cyan cubes
More colors appear as the challenge increases

Your objective is to clear all pixel cubes from the board. Each level features different cube formations, including fun shapes, items, icons, and emoji-style designs. But there is a twist. Every sphere has limited ammo. If a sphere still has remaining ammo after all matching targets are cleared, it drops into one of the waiting holder slots below. If all holder slots become occupied with unused spheres, the game is over. Plan carefully, shoot at the right time, and manage your queue before the board fills up.

Special Bonuses - Use special bonuses to overcome tricky stages:
• Shuffle - Re-shuffles all waiting spheres on the board.
• Holder - Adds one extra holder slot.
• Turtle - Slows down the movement speed of spheres on the conveyor belt.
• Skip - Skips the current level and moves you to the next stage.
• Spin -Drops bonus coins from the spin wheel.

Features
★ Marathon-style gameplay with more then 2000 unique levels
★ Fast-paced color shooter and sorting puzzle mechanics
★ Simple touch controls that are easy to learn
★ Handheld and Nintendo Switch™ Pro Controller support
★ Increasing difficulty with strategic challenges
★ Satisfying conveyor belt gameplay
★ Special power-ups and bonuses for difficult stages
★ Hand crafted fun pixel cube formations and colorful level designs
★ Global social leaderboards 
★ Professional sound effects and background music
★ Rumble support
70010000126764.intro: Tap, shoot, sort, and clear colorful pixel cubes in this fast-paced conveyor belt puzzle game!
70010000126764.name: Pixel Blaster DX

70010000129374.description:
The forest is at peace until lizards from space abduct the ranger! Now it’s up to a pair of plucky chipmunks, aka the Acorn Avengers, to make the rescue. Journey from the park all the way into space in a chase to save the beloved forest ranger. Toss boxes, hurl explosive barrels, climb trees, and most of all be sure to gather nuts!

Supports up to 2 player co-op.
70010000129374.intro: When the forest ranger is abducted, it's the Acorn Avengers to the rescue! Classic 16-bit platforming mayhem for up to 2 players co-op!
70010000129374.name: Acorn Avengers

70070000037026.description:
Enter a colorful world of fashion, princesses, animals and charming puzzle adventures!

Create stylish moments in Fashion Princess, Fashion Girls, Fashion Passion Puzzle and Fashion Friends. Solve adorable animal-themed challenges in Animal Puzzle Cats and Animal Puzzle World, enjoy fruity and nature-inspired puzzles in Fruity Puzzler and Nature Puzzle, and set out on magical adventures in Princess Puzzle Adventure and Princess Bubble Story.

Featuring ten cheerful games in one collection, Games for Girls Bundle is filled with relaxing puzzles, colorful themes and family-friendly entertainment.

This bundle includes:

Fashion Princess
Fashion Girls
Fashion Passion Puzzle
Fashion Friends
Animal Puzzle Cats
Fruity Puzzler
Nature Puzzle
Princess Puzzle Adventure
Animal Puzzle World
Princess Bubble Story
70070000037026.name: Games for Girls Bundle

70070000037087.description:
Immerse yourself in the world of bowling with Bowling Fever!

Test your skills in countless game modes, visit amazingly realistic 3D locations, play fantastic mini-games and discover dozens of new bowling balls and pins!

Need a hand? Various power-ups and boosts will help you to meet the challenges.

A bowling game has never been this exciting!

- Fantastic bowling alleys from around the world.
- Fantastic 20+ balls, pins and lanes to show off!
- Multiple mini-games to complete.
- Multiple game modes to play!

This bundle includes base game, expansion pack #1, expansion pack #2, expansion pack #4 and expansion pack #5 with:

-40 new bowling ball styles
70070000037087.intro: Fire up "Bowling Fever" and be carried away by the emotions!
70070000037087.name: Bowling Fever Epic Edition

70070000037090.description:
Push Beyond Limits – Rule the Race!

Get ready for the next generation of speed in Formula Racing Pro 2026! Experience the ultimate adrenaline rush as you take on faster cars, smarter rivals, and brand-new circuits inspired by the world’s most iconic tracks.

With enhanced graphics, improved physics, and dynamic weather, every lap feels more real than ever. Master your racing line, react to changing track conditions, and fight for the top spot in intense head-to-head battles.

Whether you’re a seasoned pro or just starting out, Formula Racing Pro 2026 delivers pure racing excitement — accessible, fast, and endlessly thrilling!

Tune your car, chase the podium, and prove you’re the fastest driver on the grid. The future of racing starts now!

This bundle includes base game, expansion pack #1, expansion pack #2 and expansion pack #4 with:

9 stunning new liveries for your race cars, adding style and personality to your high-speed adventures.
70070000037090.intro: Push Beyond Limits – The Future of Racing Starts Now!
70070000037090.name: Formula Racing Pro 2026 Legendary Edition

70070000037098.description:
Get behind the wheel in Motorbikes Pro 2025 and experience the excitement of high-speed racing! With stunning graphics and intuitive controls, this game is perfect for racers of all ages. 

This thrilling racing game puts you right in the driver’s seat of fast-paced Motorbikes racing action. Feel the rush as you speed through corners, overtake opponents, and navigate each twist and turn of the track with precision. Accessible, fun, and incredibly addictive!

Choose your car, perfect your timing, and race your way to glory. The track is calling, and the thrill of victory is just one race away!

This bundle includes base game, expansion pack #1 and expansion pack #4 with:

-2 sets of premium skins for motorbikes
70070000037098.intro: Feel the Speed, Own the Track!
70070000037098.name: Motorbikes Pro 2025 Super Edition

70070000037100.description:
Cook tons of delicious meals from all over the world and become the best chef in the city!

Cook hundreds of tasty dishes with all the possible kitchen appliances and countless ingredients! 
Try it all: coffee makers, juice machines, pizza ovens, frying pans, fryers and ice cream machines. 

Upgrade and decorate your restaurants to attract more clients. 

Upgrade your kitchen appliances and ingredients to cook tasty dishes faster and earn more money!

This comprehensive collection includes three great cooking games: Food Truck Tycoon, Burger Chef Tycoon and Pizza Bar Tycoon!

Features:
* More than 100 dishes to serve 
* 3 unique locations
* More than 200 levels to explore
* Countless upgrades
* Unlock new items to upgrade your kitchen appliances, interiors and ingredients
* 100+ achievements to gain

This bundle includes Cooking Tycoons - 3 in 1 Bundle, Pizza Bar Tycoon New Levels #1, Pizza Bar Tycoon New Levels #2 and Food Truck Tycoon New Levels #1 with:

- 40 new levels for Pizza Bar Tycoon
- 45 new levels for Food Truck Tycoon
70070000037100.intro: A series of great cooking games in one brand-new collection!
70070000037100.name: Cooking Tycoons - 3 in 1 Bundle Legendary Edition

70070000037106.description:
Racers, beware! 

Fast-paced, polished and dynamic motorbike racing now on Nintendo Switch™!

One of a kind game entirely playable with... Toy-Con™ Motorbike!

Forget about speed limits and traffic rules 'cause on this road you're the boss!

A unique mix of endless and arcade racing game featuring countless hours of fun!

IN MOTO RUSH GT YOU WILL FIND:

• Over 100 levels to beat!
• Endless racing experience
• 12 customizable motorbikes
• Toy-Con™ Motorbike support
• Race against time, ghost opponents or try various challenges! 
• Motion Controls – play by rotating your console!
• Play with the Nintendo Switch™ Pro Controller
• Support all play styles - TV Mode, Tabletop Mode, Handheld Mode, Toy-Con™ Motorbike
• Experience 4 different game modes 
• Weather and day-cycle effects: rain, night, storm! 
• Experience beautifully designed roads around the world

This bundle includes base game, Full Garage , Grip Collection #1 and Grip Collection #4 with:

- 13 new vehicles—including an ATV and bicycle!
- 16 pairs of state-of-the-art racing gloves, crafted for the ultimate grip and control.
70070000037106.intro: Ultimate motorbike racing experience for all ages!
70070000037106.name: Moto Rush GT Enhancement Edition

70070000037113.description:
In S.N.I.P.E.R.: Hunter Scope you will shoot, you will fight, and you will win!

Play S.N.I.P.E.R., the latest sniping game where you aim, fight and destroy virtual enemies. Try different types of missions, inspired both by classic rail shooters and modern cover shooters. Fight your way out during day and night, destroy evil forces and unlock new weapons and power-ups.

Game includes:
15+ STAGES
30+ WEAPONS
30+ GALLERY ITEMS
60+ SPECIAL ACHIEVEMENTS 

Become a hunter, mount your scope, and fight for our freedom!

This bundle includes base game, Weaponry Upgrade, Target Acquired and Expansion Pack #2 with:

- PIS-30-ARM pistol: a reliable sidearm 
- FMS-1-LEO rifle: a versatile and adaptable rifle for any situation 
- SN-1000-FUT sniper rifle: a state-of-the-art weapon with cutting-edge features for ultimate accuracy 
- RIF-16-DOT rifle: a high-tech rifle with a dot sight for quick target acquisition 
- SN-200-FOR sniper rifle: a powerful and accurate sniper rifle for long-range engagements 
- SN-300-FFD sniper rifle: a versatile sniper rifle for special assignments
- SN-400-SKY sniper rifle: a sleek design combined with cutting-edge technology 
- FMS-1-G rifle

Conquer your enemies in the wild west style!
70070000037113.name: S.N.I.P.E.R. - Hunter Scope Luxury Edition

70010000105998.description:
In Tune My Car: Tuning Studio & Mechanic Simulator 2026, every bolt you tighten and every upgrade you install takes you one step closer to becoming the ultimate master of automotive customization. Start your journey with a modest budget from your first story missions, build your collection one car at a time, and transform stock machines into high-performance masterpieces.

From aggressive body kits and thunderous V8 engines to precision-tuned suspensions and flawless custom paint jobs, every choice you make directly shapes your car’s style, handling, and raw power. Work hands-on in your fully equipped garage, switch freely between first-person and third-person views, and take your creations to the test track to feel the difference under your fingertips.

Key Features:
	•	Story-Driven Career – Complete missions to unlock new cars, upgrades, and opportunities.
	•	Full Vehicle Customization – Modify body parts, swap engines, fine-tune suspensions, and repaint with total freedom.
	•	Performance That Matters – Every upgrade changes acceleration, top speed, handling, and nitro performance.
	•	Free Tuning Mode – Experiment with any unlocked vehicle without mission constraints.
	•	Immersive Garage – Interact with every tool, part, and station in first or third person.
	•	Test & Perfect – Push your builds to the limit on a dedicated track before taking them to the streets.

Your garage. Your vision. Your legend.
70010000105998.intro: Are you ready to create the car of your dreams?
70010000105998.name: Tune My Car - Tuning Studio & Mechanic Simulator 2026

70010000126729.description:
Face a variety of bosses, find secret keys, unlock powerful abilities, and gain access to areas that were once unreachable.

Overcome challenging stages filled with hidden dangers and wild creatures!

Unlock powerful hidden skills!

Engage in intense battles against dangerous bosses determined to protect their territories!

Survive the dangers lurking across diverse stages, and restore order to the kingdom before everything is consumed by the dragon's power!
70010000126729.intro: The fearsome Dragon of Illusion has kidnapped the princess and plunged nature into darkness. The Forest Kingdom stands on the brink of collapse, and only you can restore peace!
70010000126729.name: Dragon of Illusion

70010000127571.description:
Players control two different burglars, each with their own role, size, and strengths. The smaller character is fast, agile, and perfect for reaching tight spaces, climbing, activating switches, and sneaking through dangerous areas. The larger character is slower but stronger, able to push heavy crates, carry objects, throw items, and help solve puzzles that the smaller character cannot complete alone.

Every level is built around cooperation, timing, and clever use of the environment. Players must move through prison corridors, security rooms, industrial platforms, locked passages, traps, lasers, moving platforms, pressure buttons, sliding doors, safes, cameras, guards, and other hazards. Progress often requires using both characters together: one may need to stand on a button while the other passes through a door, push a crate into position, avoid a patrol, disable a mechanism, or create a path forward.

Expect short but carefully designed levels with increasing complexity. Early stages introduce basic movement, buttons, doors, crates, and simple platforming. Later levels add more advanced mechanics such as moving platforms, animated traps, security cameras, laser barriers, locked safes, enemy guards, timing-based obstacles, and multi-step puzzles where both characters must work together.

Key features:
- Cooperative puzzle-platform gameplay
- Two playable characters with different abilities
- Levels built around teamwork and timing
- Pushable crates, pressure buttons, sliding doors, traps, lasers, cameras, safes, and guards
- Levels that become more complex as new mechanics are introduced
- Designed for quick, satisfying puzzle-solving sessions
70010000127571.intro: Cash Movers is a 2D cooperative puzzle-platformer about two unlikely partners trying to escape a heavily guarded building collecting as much cash as possible.
70010000127571.name: Cash Movers

70010000111316.description:
Upon signing up to a perfectly normal battle of the bands contest for a bit of fun, Faye, Ian and Briff are cursed with an unusual power and find themselves sealed to a horrible fate. Surely there's a way to get out of it, there has to be! Even if it means... *shudder* working together.

Gameplay features:
- 15-20 hours of game time
- Kick down every single door you come across
- 100+ skills, 50+ accessories and 9 classes to customize the band with, each with their own special outfit
- Outfit choices are reflected in ALL dialogue portraits and cutscenes
- Excessive amounts of hand-drawn frame-by-frame animation
- Inventive battle system that combines real-time and turn-based gameplay
- Rich soundtrack spanning a wide variety of genres
- Highly praised writing and humour
- Memorable dungeons - From traversing the hair of a giant tree lady to crowdsurfing through an entire arena
- Item system that says GOOD RIDDANCE to tedious inventory management
- 120+ unique NPCs, all with their own dialogue portraits
- Late game dating segment with 12+ endings
- You can actually use status effects on bosses!
- Singing fish are an integral part of the story
- NEW! Easy mode
- NEW! Bonus area with brutally difficult challenges

This product supports the following languages: English
70010000111316.intro: Melt a face, slap a bass or kiss a drum in this RPG about three idiot musicians. Praised for its refreshing take on the JRPG genre.
70010000111316.name: Deathbulge: Battle of the Bands

70010000118689.description:
Momento is a cozy room decorator with a twist: the objects you choose will alter the course of the story! Decorate your room, choose which items are important to you, and discover how these choices play out over the course of a lifetime.

Begin in childhood, picking out toys that represent your dreams for the future. Follow those dreams into adulthood, exploring wildly different settings and themes. Uncover stories of heartbreak, wonder and love, and learn the significance behind the sentimental treasures that follow you throughout. Pay close attention - some objects may be more than they seem at first glance.

Click your way through a delightfully tactile world, switching on lights, leafing through books, petting adorable animals, and more! Collect items and furniture in story mode to play with in the endless creative mode. At the end of it all you return to the very beginning, to discover new endings, fresh twists in the path, and explore an evolving story of love and loss.

Embark on a journey where the objects you choose to keep influence the life you lead.

Features:
• Decorative freedom: There’s no right or wrong way to arrange your space!
• Choices matter: Watch small decisions ripple over a lifetime!
• Explore freely: Search every nook and cranny of the level. There’s surprises behind every corner!
• Creative mode: Unlock items and furniture to decorate your own room in creative mode!
• Easter eggs: Solve puzzles to uncover special rewards.
• Gorgeous vibes: Immerse yourself in relaxing scenery and lovely music!
70010000118689.intro: Momento is a cozy room decorator with a twist: the objects you choose will alter the course of the story!
70010000118689.name: Momento

70010000124097.description:
Hunter Desert Simulator: Sniper Rifle challenges you to become a true hunter in the vast, endless stretches of the desert. Explore a large and demanding environment filled with wild animals adapted to harsh conditions, where precision and patience are key to success. Use your sniper skills to track and hunt prey without being detected, taking advantage of rugged terrain and natural elements to stay hidden. Every step counts in this realistic simulation that emphasizes tactical strategy and smart decision-making. 

Key Features: 
-Authentic desert environment: Explore a vast and varied landscape with dunes, rocks, and oases, carefully detailed.
 -Precision shooting: Control a specialized arsenal of sniper rifles designed for long-distance hunting. 
-Realistic wildlife behavior: Animals have natural routines and reactions, requiring observation and careful planning.
 -Strategy and patience: Be silent, use the terrain for camouflage, and plan every move to succeed.
 -Dynamic challenges: Changing environmental conditions and difficult terrain constantly test your hunting skills. 

Get ready to sharpen your senses and master the art of hunting in the heart of the desert.
70010000124097.intro: Do you have the patience to become a master hunter?
70010000124097.name: Hunter Desert Simulator: Sniper Rifle

70010000107054.description:
When a boy’s father is suddenly slain by a terrifying lightning demon, he courageously sets out on a quest of vengeance. Take the role of this young hero as he learns to gather and wield powerful demon magic known as Clarity.
