・Metal Gear Solid 4: Guns of the Patriots Bonus: Gold Camouflage

*Bonus content can be obtained by playing this game respectively.
*This requires that save data for titles included in METAL GEAR SOLID: MASTER COLLECTION Vol.1, created using the same account, be present on the console used to play this game.
*Playing this game first, then starting to play titles included in METAL GEAR SOLID: MASTER COLLECTION Vol.1, still qualifies you for this bonus.
70010000070278.name: METAL GEAR SOLID 4: Guns of the Patriots - Master Collection Version

70010000070283.description:
The extreme tension of infiltrating without being detected.
Metal Gear series, the pinnacle of “stealth action” where you avoid combat and complete missions while hiding.

The game take place 10 years after METAL GEAR SOLID 3: Snake Eater.
Amidst the swirling conspiracies behind the East-West Cold War, Snake confronts them while leading a private military force.
This is the story of how one soldier, “Snake”, becomes “Big Boss”.

【STORY】
THE ILLUSION OF PEACE FALTERS

In 1964, after saving the world from all-out nuclear war, Naked Snake, a true hero, receives the name Big Boss, but he disappears shortly after the naming ceremony.

Ten years later, Big Boss is running an independent military unit in Columbia, when he is visited by two individuals from Costa Rica, a country without a military.

In a post-Cuban Missile Crisis world, and in a Central America essential to maintaining the power balance between East and West, Costa Rica has been miraculously able to maintain peace.
However, a mysterious armed group has been seen acting suspiciously throughout the region.

They request Big Boss to investigate and eliminate the armed group.
Though he hesitates to accept the request because the tape they brought contained the voice of The Boss, who was supposed to be dead.

【System】
This title offers not only thrilling solo infiltration missions but also co-op with “SENYU” via online connections, and competitive multiplayer for up to six players.

The offshore facility Mother Base supports your missions.

It houses staff living quarters, development labs for mission weapons and gear, storage for captured large-scale weapons, and more. Expanding your staff allows Mother Base to grow and develop, incorporating simulation elements.

----------
The Screenplay Book containing in-game text from Metal Gear Solid: Peace Walker and the Master Book detailing the story and characters are also included within the game.

70010000113635.description:
The next episode of Tsubasa’s riveting adventure is here! Enjoy the thrill of spectacular soccer actions with 110 playable characters and new sensational super moves. Challenge a friend in the field or support Tsubasa on his Journey, the ball is yours.

• New and Improved Gameplay
Action on the field has been enhanced with powerful new super moves that intensify every action, from passing to blocking. The updated system adds more strategy, especially in goalkeeper versus shooter duels featuring spectacular super shots and blocks from the original series characters.

• A Soccer World That is Bigger Than Before!
Featuring 22 national teams, over 110 playable characters, and more than 150 cutscenes highlighting moves on the pitch! Previously unseen teams from the manga and original teams and characters clash in glorious, meticulous animation. The excitement of these once-in-a-lifetime moments has never been higher!

• Experience the New Storylines based on the World Youth Arc supervised by Yoichi Takahashi
Pick up where the first game left off and follow Tsubasa as he takes on formidable new rivals in the thrilling story based on the World Youth arc.
Discover expanded storylines overseen by the original creator, Yoichi Takahashi, and witness powerhouse nations clash as they chase international glory.
Step onto the pitch in the NEW STARS ROUTE, create your own custom player, join the Japanese national team, and fight alongside Tsubasa on the road to world victory.

• Powerful and Inspiring Music
Tadayoshi Makino (SpinSolfa), praised for his moving BGM tracks from the previous title, brings over 100 energized tracks to this iteration. Dare to compete with this exhilarating compilation of melodies perfectly suited to the high-octane action of Captain Tsubasa, the king of sports of anime, as Tsubasa and his teammates give their all on the pitch for the ultimate victory.

*This product is the Standard Edition. Other editions with additional content are available, so be careful of duplicate purchases.

70010000107436.description:
A strange melody has swept across Palombia… and all the animals have suddenly started dancing, leaving chaos in their wake! The creature behind this crazy beat is none other than the Mummy Queen, back from the Land of the Dead with her minions to play a cursed concert with a calamitous crescendo.

Help the Marsupilamis save Palombia from the Mummy Queen and her minions! 

A Fast-Paced 2D Platformer
Journey through four vibrant worlds in this high-energy platformer!
From the colourful jungle to the bustling city, find the clues to the Mummy Queen's hideout. Take on increasingly more intense challenges leading to the ultimate showdown against the Mummy Queen. 

3 Marsupilamis, 3 Abilities
Master the unique abilities of each Marsupilami. Switch characters to soar through the air, punch enemies, or leap across obstacles, and explore the different levels' secrets. Choose your Marsupilami wisely, and you might uncover a hidden level!

Experience the Adventure Together in Local Co-Op
Play the adventure with a friend or on your own and take on the Battle Dojos' challenges and the competitive minigames designed for friendly rivalries.

Dive Into a Vibrant, Colourful Universe Faithful to the Marsupilami Licence
Explore unforgettable environments, face memorable bosses, and uncover hidden levels, all set within a fast-paced, fun atmosphere for the whole family.
70010000107436.intro: Will you be able to follow the rhythm… or fall victim to the cursed dance?
70010000107436.name: Marsupilami 2 - Salsa Palombia

70010000124353.description:
Every Soldier Has Their Specialty: Draft your forces among a wide variety of unique units, who each have a unique set of skills to exercise on the battlefield. Bully enemies by pushing and pulling them with the hearty Champion, strike and fade with the swift Cavalier, lay devastating traps with the talented Mage, and steal your opponent’s life essence and donate it to your companions as a Vampire healer.

Work Together or Die Alone: Units have complementary skill-sets that enable a pair to accomplish more together than they would alone. Well-coordinated skills can be greater than the sum of their parts!

Take the High Ground: Exploit the terrain on the battlefield to gain the upper hand. Hold defensive positions, close drawbridges on unsuspecting enemies, or launch over walls to outflank your foes.

Mark the Dawn of a New Era: Experience a fully-featured Campaign story that spans the continent, gathering companions to your Mercenary company, and take on challenges that grow ever greater. Fate has great (and terrible) things in store for you and your companions.

Seize Fate (and the Castle)!: Missions can have multiple victory conditions, and you only need to meet one to win! When you’re on the back-foot, look for an opportunity to snatch victory from the jaws of defeat.

Time Your Attacks Wisely: Each faction moves one unit at a time. You’ll have to react to the evolving state of the battlefield as you adapt to the changing situations.
70010000124353.name: Superstar Strategy

70010000069053.description:
After the brief peace that followed the wars of the portals that devastated the country, new winds of war threaten its inhabitants when the new king of Imperia together with the Sacred Kingdom have started a war against non-humans, using the services of one of the Last Wizards of Arborea: Trece XIII and their generals, it is the moment of the prophecy, a chosen one will unite Men and beasts to bring peace. Welcome to the world of Arborea, welcome to Barbarian Saga: The Beastmaster.

— You are the last of the Beastmaster, use the souls of animals/creatures to transform and progress in the adventure.

— A continuous Metroidvania-style map, open new paths or unlock new routes with your Beastmaster abilities, evil and sorcery lurks in all corners.

— Gather beads for your ritual necklace: you will get fangs, amulets, and plant roots that will change your attacks, vitality, or Mana.

— Enter into a duel in the different Arenas the battle will be with a close camera and energy bars like in the classic fighting games. In the Arena you can enhance your skills and get unique items.

— Find new sword techniques that your old Sensei taught you, use magic potions or summons curses. Thanks to your sword, you can get the power of a god.

— Throughout your adventure you will find many NPCs (Non-Playing Characters) that will give more strength to the narrative of the story, dealing with them will open the possibility of knowing new missions, arcs (as in an Anime series) and complete different endings.
70010000069053.intro: Use your heart-devouring sword to unleash your inner beast and end the threat to Arborea in this hand-drawn 2D Metroidvania.
70010000069053.name: Barbarian Saga: The Beastmaster

70010000101703.description:
Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River is a classic-style graphic adventure about a person adrift in space who is rescued by a luxurious space station orbiting Mars. Playing as River, you'll immerse yourself in a world of comfort and pleasure—until you realize the station hides a dark secret.

In Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River, you'll navigate the station's lavish leisure facilities, using your wits to solve puzzles and move forward. As the story unfolds, you’ll begin to uncover the sinister side of the station and must choose whether to ignore it or take action.

The choices you make in Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River will challenge your ethics and test your morality. Will you do whatever it takes to protect yourself and survive, or risk everything to expose the truth and stop what's happening on board?

The game's pixel art style creates a stunning, immersive world that captures the spirit of classic adventure games. From the luxurious amenities to the station’s shadowy corners, every location in Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River is full of character and ready to be explored. Its gripping story will keep you on the edge of your seat. With multiple endings to discover, this is a game you'll want to replay.

Are you ready to embark on a journey of self-discovery and uncover the dark secrets of the space station orbiting Mars?
70010000101703.intro: Uncover the dark truth behind a luxury space station orbiting Mars.
70010000101703.name: Welcome To Mars 9: The Tale Of River

70010000117150.description:
An Unlikely Alliance

Adventures are better together… even when they don’t start that way.

In a distant corner of the Kingdom, two enterprising young souls, Moira and Adrius, find themselves in over their heads when a heist goes wrong, accidentally binding their fate to that of the realm’s greatest heroes.

Now together with Amadeus, Zoya, and Pontius, the unlikely party must journey across perilous fantasy landscapes and overcome mounting challenges to restore a powerful magic gone awry before a dangerous warlock closes in to reclaim what is his.

Perplexing Puzzles

Trine 6’s puzzles are designed with a co-op-first approach, encouraging players to work together, coordinate actions, and combine abilities to progress. All puzzles can be solved by any character, giving players the freedom to choose their characters based on preferred playstyle rather than hardcoded puzzle requirements.
For those who prefer to go it alone, updated puzzle designs also allow solo players to take on the challenges themselves.

Shared Adventure

Play with up to four players and share every moment of the adventure together. Work through challenges, celebrate shared victories, and laugh through the occasional bit of chaos with friends on the same couch or across the world via crossplay.

Take Your Time

All characters can make use of the brand-new Time-Slow ability for a bit of extra control when it matters most. Slow down the world around you to help line up precise jumps, react to threats, dodge incoming attacks, or just provide some breathing room in the most chaotic moments.

Dynamic Combat

Dodge incoming strikes, find openings, and focus your attacks while adapting to enemies with distinct abilities, including those that shield or strengthen their allies. Combat and movement go hand in hand, requiring positioning, timing, and coordination to succeed.
Boss encounters push these skills even further, blending combat, traversal, and environmental challenges into memorable trials."
Discover Secrets

Venture through a vibrant, handcrafted fantasy world filled with hidden paths and secrets waiting to be uncovered. Explore each level carefully to find rewards to help power up your heroes.

Five Unique Heroes

Trine 6 features five playable characters: three returning favorites and two brand new to the series. Each character offers a distinct playstyle and unlockable skills:
•	Amadeus the Wizard: Summon objects and manipulate the world with magic.
•	Zoya the Thief: Fire arrows at foes and use a rope to traverse and interact with the environment.
•	Pontius the Knight: Crush enemies with a hammer and use his shield to defend and propel allies.
•	Moira the Acrobat: Chain together fluid kick combos and swing through the world using her ribbon.
•	Adrius the Squire: Wield a spear in combat or plant it to create platforms for traversal.
70010000117150.intro: Trine 6: Together in Time is a co-op puzzle platformer for 1–4 players. Wit, timing, and teamwork collide in the next adventure through this fantasy world.
70010000117150.name: Trine 6: Together in Time

70010000094723.description:
COORDINATE OR CRUMBLE! To survive this mission, you'll need to grab a Joy-Con™ and get ready to swing into action. Take control of the inseparable duo, Ten and Tango, as they embark on a high-stakes platforming journey to topple the villainous Chef Murgó.

Don’t let the cute art style fool you—this is a relentless test of skill where one slip-up sends both octos tumbling. Whether you’re tackling the challenge Solo (mastering the "brain-melting" art of controlling both characters at once) or syncing up in Local or Online Co-op, your coordination will be pushed to the absolute limit.

WHY YOU’LL BE TANGLED UP:
DECEPTIVELY DIFFICULT: Master the timing of two octos holding hands. It’s quirky, colorful, and punishingly hard.

TANDEM TEAMWORK: Use your physical bond to swing across massive gaps and dodge lethal traps. In this game, you literally "carry" your partner!

DIVERSE WORLDS: Navigate windy deserts, crumbling lava mountains, and intricate puzzles that demand 100% precision.

PERFECT FOR SWITCH: Play anytime, anywhere in Tabletop, Handheld, or TV mode. One Joy-Con per player is all you need for local co-op!

GLOBAL LEADERBOARDS: Think you’re the fastest on the planet? Prove it! Compete for the best times against players worldwide.

GAME MODES:
* 2-Player Online or Local Co-op: The ultimate test of friendship and physics.
* Solo Mode: A unique mental challenge where you must coordinate both octos simultaneously.
70010000094723.intro: Two octos on a precision mission! Swing through a cute but brutal world. Master the tango of teamwork solo or in local/online co-op. Can you defeat Chef Murgó?
70010000094723.name: Tentacle Tango

70010000115744.description:
Farming Camp is a cozy, single-player farm management game that follows the journey of an ambitious teenager competing to become the best farmer in the camp. Manage your farm alongside your companions, complete chores for points, and deal with the dynamics of a colorful cast in their teenage years. 

Your path to farming greatness begins!
Step into the boots of young Alessandra, before she became the renowned Evertree Farmer. Experience her life at the Evertree Farming Camp where it all began. Learn the ropes and face the fun and chaos of camp life.

Team up with a lively farming crew
You're not alone on the farm. You’ll have the company of two budding young farmers, each with their own vibe. Assign chores, solve problems, and build friendships as you figure out how to run the farm together.

Heart, humor, and harvests!
Farming’s only half the fun at Evertree Farming Camp. From delightful dramas to silly surprises, and even a few messy moments, there's never a dull day at the camp!

Work hard to take care of the camp
Use the tools at your disposal and climb your way to the top as the camp’s best farming team. Coordinate with your companions and earn points by completing chores, maintaining the camp, attending classes, and tackling missions.  

Have fun and win the competition
Jump into quick and fun minigames that keep things exciting—whether it’s racing against the clock to eliminate pests, chopping wood, cooking delicious meals, and more!

Key Features:
- Embark on a cozy single-player farming adventure and follow a unique, captivating story. 
- Explore a beautifully hand-drawn 2D top-down world full of charming details. 
- Meet a diverse and lovable cast of characters, each with their own quirks, stories, and farming talents. 
- Grow a variety of crops, care for animals, fish, and make your team win the competition.
- Keep your farm thriving with fun and engaging mini-games.
70010000115744.intro: Follow the journey of Alessandra competing to become the best farmer in the camp.
70010000115744.name: Farming Camp

70010000090752.description:
Rainbow Island CS is a collection of several home ports of the arcade game Rainbow Islands.

In addition to the popular 8 and 16-bit versions, the collection includes the never-released-on-cartridge MegaDrive/Genesis version. With 24 quick-save/load slots for each version and a feature that displays the location of the diamonds, there's never been a better time to experience it. It also includes a feature that lets you start the game in a powered-up state.

The PC Engine version is based on the NES™ version and features a main theme arranged for FM sound by Yukiharu Urita, as well as an ending theme composed by Norihiro Furukawa, both Zuntata (Taito's sound team) alumni.

What is Rainbow Islands?
Rainbow Islands is an arcade action game released by Taito in 1987 where the player controls Bubby or Bobby, using their rainbow magic as both weapons and platforms to climb and reach the goal at the highest point of each stage.

[Story] 
At the end of the previous game, Bubble Bobble, the bubble dragons Bub and Bob had rescued their parents and girlfriends and returned to their human forms of Bubby and Bobby.
Several years after those events, Bubby and Bobby return to their ancestral home, Rainbow Islands, in search of treasure, but end up entangled in another devious plot!
It seems that their true nemesis, the Boss of Shadow, has since resumed his evil machinations. Bubby and Bobby's path is blocked by various enemies, but with the “rainbow magic” given to them by their parents, they bravely continue their adventurous journey.

*The story described here is based on the Mega Drive and PC Engine versions. The content differs slightly in the Family Computer, Nintendo Entertainment System™, and SEGA Master System versions.

Contents
・Rainbow Islands (Family Computer version) 
・Rainbow Islands (Nintendo Entertainment System version) 
・Rainbow Islands (Sega Master System version) 
・Rainbow Islands Extra (JP Mega Drive version) Rainbow Island Extra (US/EU Mega Drive/Genesis version) 
・Rainbow Islands (PC Engine CD-ROM² version)

*The background music for the Family Computer, Mega Drive, and PC Engine CD-ROM² versions uses the main theme based on the NES version.


Family Computer, Nintendo Entertainment System and NES are trademarks of Nintendo.
Mega Drive, Genesis and SEGA Master System are either registered trademarks or trademarks of SEGA Holdings Co., Ltd. or its affiliates.
PC Engine and PC Engine logo are trademarks of Konami Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd. and BIGLOBE Inc.
70010000090752.intro: Experience 6 different versions of the magical world of Rainbow Islands! That comical place full of dreams is back!
70010000090752.name: Rainbow Islands CS

70010000094826.description:
Learn a dozen abilities, each more amazing than the last!
■ STICKY HONEY - Spread honey on your face to stick to objects and climb walls
■ POWERFUL CHOCOLATE - Use hardened chocolate to break obstacles

A piece of cake?!
■ VACATIONS GONE WRONG - Welcome to the Jam Session Cruise! Lucky you, you just happened to stumble across a ticket for a lovely vacation at sea! At least, until you discover that this boat can barely float!
■ DELICIOUSLY SWEET LEVELS - Explore dozens of levels and find huge candies to fuel the boat. From fruity cakes to tropical jungles to haunted floating islands (and more!), get bready for some tasty sights!
■ FRIENDLY TOASTS EVERYWHERE - You're not alone on this cruise; lots of other toasts are along for the ride! Get to know them: they’ve all got a good reason for being there. Maybe you can help them?
■ NEO-RETRO GAMEPLAY - Got a taste for platformers? Discover this toast's original moveset: slap, aerial dash, French toast (absorb and spit out liquid!!)... No spoilers, we'll stop the list here...
■ TONS OF COLLECTIBLES - Like collecting lots of shiny little things? You’re going to loaf it! Reach for the stars with 100% completion!!!
■ CHALLENGES FOR THE BRAVE - Want to give yourself a slice of hard mode? This cruise has some nice surprises in store! But don't panic, all these challenges are optional.
70010000094826.intro: Pardon My French Toast is a 3D platformer starring a slice of toast who covers himself in sweet spreads to get fun abilities.
70010000094826.name: Pardon My French Toast

70010000096680.description:
A vibrant sci-fi platform adventure game for the Nintendo Switch™, where you help Maxwell the dog explore unfamiliar worlds, make strange new friends and contend with mysterious forces - by jumping, shooting, slicing, shrinking, warping and drilling.

Maxwell’s homeworld is nearing collapse. In a last ditch-effort to find help, he hyperjumps where no dog has gone before. Stranded, he finds himself on the edge of a hostile system - if there’s any hope of return and rescue he’ll need every friend (and every weapon) he can find.

Forced to confront this celestial expanse head on, Maxwell stays strong - determined to keep his head up and lend a helping hand to everyone he meets on his journey. Like all underdogs, the odds are stacked against him, but you can’t keep a good dog down.

Key Features
· Explore jam-packed levels with multiple routes
· Make 50+ friends & collect their friendship cards
· Upgrade your blaster with special abilities
· Find hidden areas and take on a variety of boss battles
· Local couch co-op multiplayer mode
· Bonus prequel content: Chapter Zero
70010000096680.intro: Help Maxwell explore unfamiliar worlds, make strange new friends and contend with mysterious forces.
70010000096680.name: Goodboy Galaxy

70010000122696.description:

Traverse massive, fantastical landscapes and master seamless real-time RPG combat that has all been enhanced to run at 4K* resolution in TV mode, and full HD in handheld mode, at 60 frames per second with smoother and sharper cutscenes. 

This Nintendo Switch 2 Edition also includes some additional content! Recruit a new Hero—complete with an additional quest—and put your strength to the test against waves of enemies in a new defensive battle mode. The game’s event scenes are now also fully voiced.

Already have Xenoblade Chronicles™ 3 for Nintendo Switch? Purchase the upgrade pack!   

If you already have the game for Nintendo Switch, you can purchase the upgrade pack** separately to play this version on Nintendo Switch 2.
